title: Project Foundation
summary: Complete foundation implementation with HTML structure, CSS grid layout, game state management, win/draw detection, localStorage integration, and comprehensive E2E test coverage (95/95 tests passing)
details: Created single HTML file with embedded CSS and JavaScript sections
Implemented CSS Grid 3x3 board layout with styled cells and dark theme
Added game state management with turn tracking, win detection (8 winning lines), and draw detection
Implemented cell click handlers with turn alternation and occupied cell protection
Integrated localStorage for score persistence with error handling
Added npm scripts for typecheck, build, lint, and test
Created comprehensive E2E test suite with Playwright (95 tests, 100% passing)
Verified all P0 requirements and edge cases handled
